request.description: Returns paginated feed filtered by a single topic (fixed or the user's own custom topic — see GET /feed/topics), creator type and post type. Pass topic_id (id from /feed/topics) to target any topic, including custom ones. The category query param (a fixed topic's slug: newest, local, friendship, trending, olympics) still works as a legacy alias and takes the same effect as its matching topic_id — defaults to 'newest' when neither is given.

response.name: Success

The category query param (a fixed topic's slug: newest, local, friendship, trending, olympics) still works as a legacy alias and takes the same effect as its matching topic_id — defaults to 'newest' when neither is given.

item.name: Chat
item.description: One-on-one chat between connected friends. Blocked users and non-friends cannot message each other.

request.description: Send a message (text and/or file attachments) to a connected friend. Creates the private conversation on first contact between the two users. Fails if the two users aren't connected (see Friends) or either has blocked the other.

response.name: Success - Text Only

originalRequest.description: Send a message (text and/or file attachments) to a connected friend. Creates the private conversation on first contact between the two users. Fails if the two users aren't connected (see Friends) or either has blocked the other.
